message:
test(abi): add e2e composition tests and clean up existing test code

Add e2e_composition_test.rs exercising real-world multi-entrypoint
call sequences: strlen→malloc→memcpy→strcmp→free pipeline, allocator
stress interleaving, ctype+string composition, errno preservation,
math chain verification (sin²+cos²=1), concurrent string+alloc with
errno isolation (4-thread), and stdlib parse+compute pipeline.

Clean up existing tests:
- hardened_mode_safety_test.rs, strict_mode_refinement_test.rs:
  replace b"...\0".as_ptr() as *const c_char with c"...".as_ptr()
- property_tests.rs: replace manual ASCII digit check with
  c.is_ascii_digit()
- stub_priority_test.rs: add gate_script_passes test executing
  check_stub_priority.sh
- stub_todo_debt_census_test.rs: relax critical_source_debt.entries
  from must-be-non-empty to must-be-array

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
